MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOS. TO DEFT'S DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELKRIS ASSOCIATES, INC. DBA CREDIT BUREAU ASSOCIATES

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HEIDI KONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 1, 2013, TO GIVE MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULES 2.6B AND 2.6C. BOTH PARTIES MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 30, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 618 =(302/LCN)

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT HEIDI KONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Off Calendar. This action is stayed pending determination of proceedings in bankruptcy court. See In re McGhan 288 F.3d 1172, 1180 (9th Cir. 2002). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2013 Continued To Nov-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT HEIDI KONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 27, 2013. SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION TO BE FILED BY NOVEMBER 8, 2013 ON THE ISSUE UNDER THE MATTERA CASE WHERE THE PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED WITH A LEAVE TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE NEW HEARING DATE. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Continued To Nov-01-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT HEIDI KONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to November 1, 2013, to give moving and opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rules 2.6B and 2.6C. Both parties must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 30, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 618 =(302/LCN)
